settings.title: Settings
settings.splashDurationDescription: How long the splash screen is shown on startup (ms). Takes effect on next launch.

cces.title: CCES (Extensions Summary)
cces.openingDefault: The following is a snapshot of my current Claude Code Extensions for this project. Please use it to understand what tools, skills, and constraints I have configured.
cces.allowAllProjectsHelp: Currently CCES is enabled on every project regardless of this switch. After 037 (R3b fix), this switch becomes effective: Off restricts CCES to MANX-conformant projects, leaving Legacy projects greyed out.

profileSwitch.title: Profile Switch
profileSwitch.confirmToLegacy: This will back up the MANX configuration in ~/.claude/ and switch to Legacy. Continue?
profileSwitch.confirmToManx: This will discard the Legacy configuration and restore MANX. Continue?

quickActions.title: Quick Actions
quickActions.resetConfirm: This will return you to the setup screen and relaunch the app. Continue?

featureFlags.title: Feature Flags
featureFlags.description: Enable or disable each feature independently. When OFF, the corresponding UI is hidden completely.

setup.welcomeDescription: Do you have Claude Code configuration files (CLAUDE.md, etc.)?
setup.freshStartDescription: I don't have any / I want to start fresh
setup.migrationDescription: I have existing CLAUDE.md or rules/

fresh.title: Fresh Start
fresh.passwordDescription: This will be set as auth.password in settings.json
fresh.previewDescription: The following files will be deployed to ~/.claude/

migration.title: Migration
migration.scanDescription: Detect CC configuration files. Select a project folder.
migration.packDescription: Pass the pack to claude.ai for conversion
migration.packImportHint: After getting the conversion result, import it below.
migration.browserStep1: 1. Click the button above — the Pack is copied and claude.ai opens
migration.browserStep2: 2. Press Ctrl+V (or Cmd+V) to paste in the input field
migration.browserStep3: 3. Press Enter to send — then copy the result for import
migration.continueHint: Processing may be interrupted due to claude.ai's tool usage limits. Press the "Continue" button at the bottom to resume. Keep pressing "Continue" until the .pit file is generated.
migration.cpCopyDescription: Copy the generated Pack to the clipboard, then proceed to the next step.
migration.convertDescription: Open claude.ai and follow these steps to receive the .pit file.
migration.convertStep1: 1. Paste into the input field (Ctrl+V / Cmd+V)
migration.convertStep3: 3. If interrupted by tool usage limits, press the "Continue" button
migration.convertStep4: 4. When the .pit file is generated, download it
migration.importDescription: Select or drop the .pit file generated by claude.ai
migration.passwordDescription: This will be set as auth.password in settings.json

projects.title: Projects
projects.removeConfirm: Remove this project from the registry? Files will not be deleted.
projects.name: Name

discover.title: Discover CC Projects
discover.description: Scan under the given folder for projects containing CLAUDE.md. Multi-select to import in batch.
discover.noResults: No candidates found. Run a scan first.

removeFromList.title: Remove from CCPIT List
removeFromList.description: Remove selected projects from the CCPIT management list. Multi-select supported.
removeFromList.warning: This does NOT delete files. The project folder, CLAUDE.md, and .ccpit/ are left untouched. Only the list entry is removed.

migration.protocolHistoryV2: Past edits are now saved as history ({{count}} project(s) migrated)

fullRescanDialog.title: Re-scan all projects?
fullRescanDialog.body:
Re-runs protocol detection for {{count}} project(s) with the latest logic.
Projects with manually-edited markers (confirmed) are protected.

cces.tooltip: Copy a summary of Claude Code's extensions for this project to the clipboard
cces.oversizedWarning: Generated for {{project}} ({{size}} KB) — summary is large, consider trimming

health.title: Health
health.denyTestDescription: Verify that deny rules in settings.json are active
health.manualTestHint: Open a terminal and run the following commands to test deny rules:
health.noResults: Run health check to see results

rk.title: Recovery Kit
rk.noSnapshots: No snapshots yet. Take one to get started.
rk.restoreConfirm: Restore to this snapshot? Current files will be moved to quarantine.

da.title: Doctor Analysis
da.symptomPlaceholder: Describe the issue or unexpected behavior...
da.browserStep1: 1. Click the button above — the Pack is copied and claude.ai opens
da.browserStep2: 2. Press Ctrl+V (or Cmd+V) to paste in the input field
da.continueHint: Processing may be interrupted due to claude.ai's tool usage limits. Press the "Continue" button at the bottom to resume. Keep pressing "Continue" until the diagnosis is complete.

requestInbox.title: CC Request Inbox
requestInbox.description: Apply settings.json change requests emitted by Claude Code (CC).
requestInbox.parseError: Failed to parse the request file

empty.line2: CC writes requests under your project, e.g.:

auth.title: Authentication
auth.required: auth.password is registered. Enter it to apply.
auth.notSet: auth.password is not set. Apply will run without password verification.
auth.placeholder: Enter the password registered in settings.json

rollback.title: Rollback to a Backup
rollback.confirm: Restore settings.json from this backup. Continue?

editMarker.notice: Saving sets stage_inferred to false (explicit value).
editMarker.confirmRescan: Re-run auto-marking and overwrite the existing marker. Continue?
